channel.title: privacy on Captain Jak.
channel.description: Recent content in privacy on Captain Jak.

item.title: Social Engineering attacks in Metaverse
item.description: This article is all about, Advanced Social Engineering attacks on vulnerable people in Metaverse. Unlike traditional Social engineering attacks, hackers using the most advance and effective methods to get personal/sensitive data from people of Metaverse without getting caught.

item.title: Right to be Forgotten vs Know your Customer
item.description: My experiences on Data removal requests from legal/pvt companies, collides with Know Your Customer policy.

item.title: Privacy in the age of 'Information is Privilege'
item.description: ‘Information is Privilege’ Does users data privacy is being valued?? This article is being drafted now
